ON MATCH SET cve1.summary = CASE WHEN cve1.summary IS NULL OR cve1.summary = '' THEN 'Zero-day vulnerability dubbed Dogwalk; tied to Microsoft Windows Support Diagnostic Tool; enables code execution; actively exploited in the wild; exploitation requires adversary physical access to the vulnerable computer.' ON MATCH SET mit1.summary = CASE WHEN mit1.summary IS NULL OR mit1.summary = '' THEN 'Apply vendor security patches to remediate known vulnerabilities.' ELSE mit1.summary END

ON CREATE SET mitr1.status = 'recommended',

  v_us_med.sector = CASE WHEN v_us_med.sector IS NULL OR v_us_med.sector = '' THEN 'Healthcare' ELSE v_us_med.sector END,
  v_us_med.country_iso2 = CASE WHEN v_us_med.country_iso2 IS NULL OR v_us_med.country_iso2 = '' THEN 'US' ELSE v_us_med.country_iso2 END,
  v_us_med.summary = CASE WHEN v_us_med.summary IS NULL OR v_us_med.summary = '' THEN 'Medical research organizations in the United States targeted by APT35 in late 2020.' ELSE v_us_med.summary END
MERGE (v_us_med)-[:located_in]->(c_us)

MERGE (sec_health:Sector {name:'Healthcare'})
MERGE (inc_2020_med:Incident {id:'apt35-2020-late-medical-research-targeting'})
ON CREATE SET
  inc_2020_med.date = date('2020-01-01'),
  inc_2020_med.type = 'cyberespionage',
  inc_2020_med.summary = 'In late 2020, APT35 targeted medical research organizations in Israel and the U.S.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc_2020_med.date = CASE WHEN inc_2020_med.date IS NULL THEN date('2020-01-01') ELSE inc_2020_med.date END,
  inc_2020_med.type = CASE WHEN inc_2020_med.type IS NULL OR inc_2020_med.type = '' THEN 'cyberespionage' ELSE inc_2020_med.type END,
  inc_2020_med.summary = CASE WHEN inc_2020_med.summary IS NULL OR inc_2020_med.summary = '' THEN 'In late 2020, APT35 targeted medical research organizations in Israel and the U.S.' ELSE inc_2020_med.summary END
MERGE (inc_2020_med)-[:attributed_to {confidence:'stated', evidence:'In late 2020, the group targeted medical research organizations in Israel and in the U.S.'}]->(ta_apt35)
MERGE (inc_2020_med)-[:targets {date: date('2020-01-01'), evidence:'Targeted medical research organizations in Israel.'}]->(v_il_med)
MERGE (inc_2020_med)-[:targets {date: date('2020-01-01'), evidence:'Targeted medical research organizations in the U.S.'}]->(v_us_med)
MERGE (inc_2020_med)-[:targets_sector]->(sec_health)
MERGE (inc_2020_med)-[:occurred_in]->(c_il)
MERGE (inc_2020_med)-[:occurred_in]->(c_us)

MERGE (tech_proxy:Technique {technique_id:'T1190', name:'Exploit Public-Facing Application', tactic:'Initial Access'})
ON CREATE SET tech_proxy.summary = 'Abuse of Microsoft Exchange Server vulnerabilities chained as ProxyShell.'
ON MATCH SET tech_proxy.summary = CASE WHEN tech_proxy.summary IS NULL OR tech_proxy.summary = '' THEN 'Abuse of Microsoft Exchange Server vulnerabilities chained as ProxyShell.' ELSE tech_proxy.summary END
MERGE (inc_2021_proxyshell:Incident {id:'apt35-2021-proxyshell-exchange'})
ON CREATE SET
  inc_2021_proxyshell.date = date('2021-01-01'),
  inc_2021_proxyshell.type = 'intrusion',
  inc_2021_proxyshell.summary = 'By 2021, APT35 was abusing Microsoft Exchange Server vulnerabilities chained together (ProxyShell).'
ON MATCH SET
  inc_2021_proxyshell.date = CASE WHEN inc_2021_proxyshell.date IS NULL THEN date('2021-01-01') ELSE inc_2021_proxyshell.date END,
  inc_2021_proxyshell.type = CASE WHEN inc_2021_proxyshell.type IS NULL OR inc_2021_proxyshell.type = '' THEN 'intrusion' ELSE inc_2021_proxyshell.type END,
  inc_2021_proxyshell.summary = CASE WHEN inc_2021_proxyshell.summary IS NULL OR inc_2021_proxyshell.summary = '' THEN 'By 2021, APT35 was abusing Microsoft Exchange Server vulnerabilities chained together (ProxyShell).' ELSE inc_2021_proxyshell.summary END
MERGE (inc_2021_proxyshell)-[:attributed_to {confidence:'stated', evidence:'By 2021, APT35 was abusing Microsoft Exchange Server vulnerabilities that were chained together (ProxyShell).'}]->(ta_apt35)
MERGE (inc_2021_proxyshell)-[:used_technique {phase:'Initial Access', details:'ProxyShell (chained Microsoft Exchange Server vulnerabilities)', evidence:'Abusing Microsoft Exchange Server vulnerabilities chained together (ProxyShell).'}]->(tech_proxy)

MERGE (mal_new:Malware {name:'New intelligence-collection malware strain (APT35, 2022)'})
ON CREATE SET mal_new.summary = 'New strain of malware observed in 2022 used by APT35 for intelligence collection.'
ON MATCH SET mal_new.summary = CASE WHEN mal_new.summary IS NULL OR mal_new.summary = '' THEN 'New strain of malware observed in 2022 used by APT35 for intelligence collection.' ELSE mal_new.summary END
MERGE (tool_hyper:Tool {name:'Hyperscrape'})
ON CREATE SET tool_hyper.summary = 'Tool used by APT35 to quietly extract emails from victims’ mailboxes.'
ON MATCH SET tool_hyper.summary = CASE WHEN tool_hyper.summary IS NULL OR tool_hyper.summary = '' THEN 'Tool used by APT35 to quietly extract emails from victims’ mailboxes.' ELSE tool_hyper.summary END

MERGE (inc_2022_newtactics:Incident {id:'apt35-2022-new-tactics-malware-hyperscrape'})
ON CREATE SET
  inc_2022_newtactics.date = date('2022-01-01'),
  inc_2022_newtactics.type = 'cyberespionage',
  inc_2022_newtactics.summary = 'As of 2022, APT35 used new tactics, including a new malware strain for intelligence collection and the Hyperscrape tool to quietly extract emails from mailboxes.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc_2022_newtactics.date = CASE WHEN inc_2022_newtactics.date IS NULL THEN date('2022-01-01') ELSE inc_2022_newtactics.date END,
  inc_2022_newtactics.type = CASE WHEN inc_2022_newtactics.type IS NULL OR inc_2022_newtactics.type = '' THEN 'cyberespionage' ELSE inc_2022_newtactics.type END,
  inc_2022_newtactics.summary = CASE WHEN inc_2022_newtactics.summary IS NULL OR inc_2022_newtactics.summary = '' THEN 'As of 2022, APT35 used new tactics, including a new malware strain for intelligence collection and the Hyperscrape tool to quietly extract emails from mailboxes.' ELSE inc_2022_newtactics.summary END
MERGE (inc_2022_newtactics)-[:attributed_to {confidence:'stated', evidence:'As of 2022, APT35 has been observed using new tactics to attack a wide range of targets.'}]->(ta_apt35)
MERGE (ta_apt35)-[:uses {date: date('2022-01-01'), evidence:'Using a new strain of malware ... for intelligence collection.'}]->(mal_new)
MERGE (ta_apt35)-[:uses {date: date('2022-01-01'), evidence:'Seen using a new tool called Hyperscrape to quietly extract emails from victim mailboxes.'}]->(tool_hyper)
MERGE (inc_2022_newtactics)-[:involved_malware {evidence:'Using a new strain of malware for intelligence collection.'}]->(mal_new)
MERGE (inc_2022_newtactics)-[:involved_tool {evidence:'Using Hyperscrape to quietly extract emails from victim mailboxes.'}]->(tool_hyper)

MERGE (tech_email:Technique {technique_id:'T1114', name:'Email Collection', tactic:'Collection'})
ON CREATE SET tech_email.summary = 'Quiet extraction/collection of emails from victim mailboxes.'
ON MATCH SET tech_email.summary = CASE WHEN tech_email.summary IS NULL OR tech_email.summary = '' THEN 'Quiet extraction/collection of emails from victim mailboxes.' ELSE tech_email.summary END
MERGE (inc_2022_newtactics)-[:used_technique {phase:'Collection', details:'quietly extract emails from mailboxes (Hyperscrape)', evidence:'Hyperscrape used to quietly extract emails from victim mailboxes.'}]->(tech_email);
